creator: john@saltant.com
text:
(In reply to Wen Heping from comment #5)

Nice work.

pyparsing [0] and six [1] need patch-setup.py

setuptools needs RUN_DEPENDS+=BUILD_DEPENDS

pkg-plist needs %%PORTVERSION%%, %%PYTHON_VER%% consistently, or just %%PYDISTUTILS_EGGINFO%% (right?)

packaging needs {BUILD,RUN}_DEPENDS+=${blah}:devel/py-pyparsing

[0] https://sourceforge.net/p/pyparsing/code/HEAD/tree/tags/pyparsing_2.1.10/src/setup.py#l4
[1] https://github.com/benjaminp/six/blob/master/setup.py#L23
